data.name: Randel Tales
data.detailed_description:
Randel Tales is an adult visual novel developed by EroSandwich Studio in which you get to meet many different people (mostly girls), go on many adventures with them and, who knows, maybe even get to bed a few of them?

You play as an orphaned 19-year-old man who was taken in by a merchant when he was 4 and currently lives in the town of Randel. Now that he's come of age, he is enlisted in the Academy and joins the Adventurer's Guild, becoming an adventurer like he has always dreamed of... and getting laid much, much more than he could ever have dreamed of.

From elves to dwarves, from shy childhood friends to mean redheads, from nympho guards to pure town girls, the town of Randel truly has it all.

  • A total of 10 love interests with their own route!

  • Lots of high-quality illustrations, and over a dozen animated scenes!

  • Over 200k words of dialogue that will take hours to complete!

  • An OST to immerse you in the fantastical world of Randel Tales!

data.short_description: Randel Tales is an Adult Visual Novel in which you play as a young adventurer as he goes on adventures and meets many cute girls that are more than willing to sleep with him! But even though everything seems great, you can't help but feel like everything is about to come crashing down.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 550 MB 可用空間
